name: SyncPolicy
description: Policy controlling how and when the application is synchronized.

prune.description: Automatically delete resources removed from the source.

selfHeal.description: Automatically sync when live state drifts from desired state.

allowEmpty.description: Allows apps to have an empty source.

syncOptions.description: List of sync option flags (e.g., CreateNamespace=true, PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground).

retry.description: Retry configuration for failed sync operations.

limit.description: Maximum number of retry attempts. -1 for unlimited.

factor.description: Multiplicative factor applied to duration on each retry.
